bullets: New: sign dichotomy — every subcritical periodic script solves to a negative rational; the impostors −1, −5, −17 explained
Syracuse ≈ (rotation by log₂3 on the mantissa) × (full shift on trailing bits); the conjecture is the vanishing O(1/n) coupling
Exact theorem: v₂(3n+1) = trailing-bit match between n and 2-adic −1/3
